name: The Swing Lab by Buffalo Golf & Social
about: The Swing Lab by Buffalo Golf & Social is a private indoor studio located in downtown Buffalo, offering members-only access to a suite equipped with premium Trackman technology combined with Gears Sports technology for real-time feedback. It provides a focused environment for golfers looking to utilize top-tier simulator technology, with options for lessons, fittings, and practice. The venue operates on a membership basis, catering to both individual golfers and groups seeking a high-tech golf experience in a dedicated, private setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman and Gears Sports technology providing detailed shot analysis
Members-only private indoor studio for an exclusive, focused practice environment
Custom lesson packages available from a highly experienced instructor with a background at MIT
Convenient downtown Buffalo location with access to multiple simulator-ready courses

food_and_drink.notes: No information on alcohol service; BYOB not explicitly mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Suite featuring Trackman technology combined with Gears Sports for real-time feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs for simulator sessions, lessons, and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No specific policy on BYOB is mentioned; contact the venue directly for inquiries on bringing outside food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typical 18-hole simulator rounds take approximately 1-2 hours, depending on the course and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue is geared towards adults and serious golfers, with a private, members-only focus and no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or activities.
